name: Tuna Salmon Rosette with Cucumber Salad and Citrus Oil
recipeIngredient: 1 pound sushi quality tuna, sliced thin
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium saucepan, combine the grapeseed or canola oil, sesame oil, lime juice, lemon zest, and lime zest. Bring to a boil and let sit overnight. Strain and set aside.
2. Slice cucumbers into thin strips lengthwise. In a skillet over medium heat, saute garlic and shallots for two minutes. Add honey and soy sauce. Remove from heat and stir in Chinese mustard, cucumber, and diced tomatoes. Let sit for at least 2 hours.
3. Pound tuna and salmon slices to an even thickness using a knife handle or meat tenderizer. Cut into 1 1/2-inch strips.
4. Place two salmon slices on top of two tuna slices lengthwise. Roll the salmon and tuna strips, then gently push the top of the roll outward to form a rosette.
5. To serve, spoon cucumber salad onto plates. Place tuna salmon rosettes on top of the salad.
6. Bring citrus oil to a boil. Pour 1/2 tablespoon of hot citrus oil over the rosette and serve immediately.
Yield: 4 servings
